name: test-patterns
description: Test patterns: Tests use describe/test/expect from bun:test, createStoreFromScope for store setup. Auth tests should use MockAuthService.
relevantCode: import { describe, test, expect } from 'bun:test'; const result = createStoreFromScope(Domain); const store = result.createStore();
recommendation: Auth tests should use MockAuthService injected via environment, test signUp/signIn/signOut flows, error handling, and state synchronization.
